creator: sbudella@gmail.com
text:
hi mr Kostyrko, the links to the files are always working, but the
free server web on which the files are on seems to apply some stupid
redirect. however, I attached to this mail the complete patch together
with the explaining paper.
Keep me updated on what will be going on regarding my work, since it
received no feedback at all at the time of its release.
thank you very much,
- giuseppe

On Mon, Oct 1, 2012 at 3:13 PM, Volodymyr Kostyrko <c.kworr@gmail.com> wrote:
> Links are stale and all data seem to be lost. Alas, this one never can be
> completed.
>
> --
> Sphinx of black quartz judge my vow.

every day above ground is a good one
